title: Skill Creation Retro Codification
summary: Codify retro findings from nlm-meta-prompt skill creation into reusable templates, checklists, and snippets for future AI and human use.
keyOutcomes: Retro Delivery Checklist for skill work
Global Skill Index in repo docs
risks: Snippet placement may require snippet-writer skill validation
Global skill index could become stale if skills are added/removed without updating
dependencies: snippet-writer skill (for Phase 3 snippet frontmatter standards)
validationCriteria: All 4 deliverables exist at target paths
Runbook covers all retro-identified improvement areas
Retro checklist maps to 6 mandatory questions
Index note lists actual global skills with descriptions
